import io
import string

fn find_eq(_ s: String) -> Option<Int>
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut found = -1
  while i < n
    if found < 0
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 61
          found = i
        end
      when None
        i = i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if found < 0
    None
  else
    Some(found)
  end
end

fn process(_ line: String) -> Unit
  match find_eq(line)
  when Some(i)
    if i > 0
      let key = string.substring(line, 0, i)
      let value = string.substring(line, i + 1, string.len(line))
      println("#{key}:#{value}")
    end
  when None
    print("")
  end
end

mut running = true
while running
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    process(line)
  when None
    running = false
  end
end
